caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and large black headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. His shirt features the text "CHECK IT!" and "MAN," while he wears several gold chains around his neck. Behind him, a white wall displays a pattern of gold stars and the repeated phrase "EMPOWER HUSTLE." A large sign reading "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in the background. On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and the text "BOSS TALK 101." As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his gaze slightly and changing his facial expression as he engages in conversation. The camera remains in a medium shot, capturing him from the waist up, with the microphone positioned directly in front of him.
